title: Surface bounded Attention Items
description: Deferred until private evidence establishes numeric thresholds with zero false high-severity outcomes. Goal trace: G5.
rationale: Unvalidated severities or an unbounded list would create alert fatigue and imply advice unsupported by evidence.
story_want: see a small ordered set of evidence-backed items worth inspecting
story_so_that: important exceptions are visible without becoming prescriptive notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given an activated Attention policy and a supported metric or signal crossing its released threshold, when Attention Items are generated, then each item cites exactly one source result, threshold, low/medium/high severity, evidence state, and policy version.
Given unavailable, insufficient, deferred, stale, or incoherent source evidence, when Attention Items are generated, then no item is created from that source.

Given more than five eligible items, when output is ordered, then exactly five are returned by severity descending, released signal-kind rank, totals before categories, stable category identity, then metric code.
Given an Attention Item, when its meaning is inspected, then it requests inspection only and contains no prescribed financial action, notification policy, or delivery instruction.
